# CLAUDE.md — Jellyfin Telegram Channel Sync

## Project Overview

Sync Jellyfin user access with Telegram channel membership — auto-disable accounts when members leave.

- **Repo:** [GeiserX/jellyfin-telegram-channel-sync](https://github.com/GeiserX/jellyfin-telegram-channel-sync)
- **Language:** Python
- **License:** GPL-3.0

## Security

> **Do not commit secrets to the repository.**
> Use environment variables or secure vaults for credentials.
